title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
